base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_sacred_flame_column — a effect_layer from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Sacred Flame / final-battle flame column — 3-frame flame animation. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Sacred Flame / final-battle flame column — 3-frame flame animation; used for final-confrontation arena
